content.content: Instagram star and entrepreneur who handles PR for clients in the fashion and real estate sector. She is the CEO of Charlotte Music S.R.L. She has 6 million followers on Instagram. She started modeling in Italy when she was 16 years old. She and her husband have featured together in Caribbean based Adidas promotions. She's married to the rapperMozart La Para. They had a daughter together, Charlotte Fernández, in 2013. In February 2018 she posted a selfie to Instagram withCardi B.
